titles.title: I Love Jesus, Yes, I Do

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the world my heart is rending, With its heaviest storm of care, My glad tho’ts to God ascending, Find a refuge from despair.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I love Jesus, Hallelujah! I love Jesus, yes, I do, I do love Jesus; He’s my Saviour; Jesus smiles, and loves me too.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There’s a hand of mercy near me, Tho’ the waves of trouble roar; There’s an hour of rest to cheer me, When the toils of life are o’er.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: O, to rest in peace forever, Joined with happy souls above, Where no foe my heart can sever From the Saviour whom I love.

verse.name: v5
